items.reviewerNotes: Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0782 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Diagram shows two continuous white lines + stop sign before intersection meaning 's'arrêter et céder le passage' (stop and yield). No clear exact qid match in candidates.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Blue rectangular 'P' sign = generic car park. Source key = B ('parking en plein air'). Candidate matches are ambiguous between indoor/outdoor; safer to create new localized item.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: ROW prompt matches q0259 ('Can leave the highway into the ramp from this location directly.') and machine/top-candidate correctRow = Wrong. French option B = 'No' maps to Wrong.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0035 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0746 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Rectangular toll booth sign with ticket/hand icon; q0800 = 'stop to get a card' matches source A 'borne de retrait de ticket de péage'.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Triangle train warning with supplementary stripes/distance. Source selects '100 m ... non surveillé' (C) but candidate q0682 mapping of numeric options differs (50 vs 100) and candidates disagree on which option letter maps to which distance. Numeric mismatch -> unresolved until verifier confirms distance/stripe convention.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0004 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Sentence asserts signs and road markings are not traffic signals — this is false. q0266 states 'Traffic Signs and traffic markings are not traffic signals' and correctRow = Wrong. French option B = No (Wrong).

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image is a yellow triangular warning sign with a black cross — a crossroad. q0764's meaning 'intersection' matches; source option C ('intersection en croix') is the matching localized letter.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Scene shows pedestrians at an intersection — safe action is to slow down and pass at reduced speed. q0364 matches exactly; source option C is the localized equivalent.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Dashboard indicator (green) appears to be the front-fog lamp symbol. q0580 has 'front fog light is turned on' as an option — maps to source option A. Top machine match was different (trunk open), so moderate risk. Rejected top matcher: Top machine match q0617 indicates trunk/boot open which conflicts with the visual fog-light semantics; q0580 is a better semantic match.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Red seatbelt dashboard icon — indicates seatbelt not fastened. q0571 corresponds to that meaning. Source 'Yes' is option A (Right). Top machine candidate (q0570) was different (seat adjustment), so non-top match chosen. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0570 refers to seat adjustment, not seatbelt; q0571 better matches the shown seatbelt indicator.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Image shows a triangular marked area circled, but candidate mappings conflict (guide line / cross-hatched / stop line) and the source options are ambiguous; cannot confidently map to an existing qid.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows a normal green traffic light — statement 'This traffic light prohibits turning right' is false. q0650's correctRow is Wrong; source 'No' (B) maps to Wrong.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Rectangular sign with red/white diagonals typically indicates direction to pass an obstacle, but image tags do not show stripe orientation (left/right). Cannot determine whether 'circulation à gauche' or 'à droite' or other option is correct.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Text statement about reversing — driver must observe surroundings and be ready to stop — matches q0008 (Right). Source 'Yes' (A) corresponds to Right.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0464 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Statement 'Snow plows or road maintenance trucks in active operation are given priority' is a valid traffic-safety assertion but no close candidate qid in the shortlist matches this exact rule; recommend creating a new localized question. Answer is 'Yes' (A). Rejected top matcher: Top candidates are snow/icy-driving advice (q0022 etc.) but none explicitly state priority for active snowplows; therefore create new question.

Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Image shows two solid white center lines with opposite-direction arrows — meaning a separation line that cannot be crossed for opposite directions. No close existing qid match.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks what to do when wipers cannot wipe in a storm; q0145 correct = 'immediately reduce speed and stop at the road side'. That meaning corresponds to French option C.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: q0267 states in fog driver should turn on fog light and hazard lights (ROW = Right). French 'Yes' (A) matches Right/True.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0236 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Question about flashing light at railway crossing — correct behavior is to stop / not cross the stop line (French D). No clear exact existing qid match; choose createNew. Moderate uncertainty due to possible jurisdictional phrasing.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Red exclamation dashboard light matches q0541 (statement 'Does not affect normal driving when it lights.' = Wrong). French 'No' (B) corresponds to Wrong. Small risk due to symbol ambiguity.
Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Image shows two continuous yellow center lines on a two-way road — this is a prohibitive marking. No clear existing qid match in shortlist.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Embedded indicator image is blue (visual semantics suggest high-beam), but French options list low-beam/fog/side/rear fog only; no 'high beam' option — conflict between image semantics and available answers. Cannot resolve reliably.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0474 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Green rectangular motorway sign with telephone pictogram = highway emergency/public phone; candidate q0761 meaning ('highway emergency phone') matches source option C ('poste d'appel d'urgence'). Visual semantics align.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Image clearly shows rear window defrost symbol; statement is a ROW (Yes). Top machine candidates point to other indicator meanings (high beam etc.) — no clear existing qid for rear defogger; create new localized item with answer 'Yes' (A). Rejected top matcher: Top machine match q0528 refers to high-beam indicator, which contradicts the visual rear-defogger symbol in the source image.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Blue circular mandatory sign with single white upwards arrow = 'obligation d'aller tout droit'. Candidate q0855 ('going straight only') matches this meaning; map to local option B. Rejected top matcher: Top machine suggestion q0769 (main road priority) is semantically different from this 'go straight only' mandatory sign.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Blue circular sign with arrows straight + right = 'go straight or turn right'. q0768 in bank corresponds to 'going straight and right turn' (master correct key differs but meaning matches); local option A corresponds to that meaning. Rejected top matcher: Top machine suggestion q0868 ('turn right') does not capture the combined 'straight or right' meaning.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Text and gloss exactly match q0078: when going downhill use engine braking and control speed. Source options are Yes/No; correct = Yes (A).
Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Conservative unresolved decision because evidence was insufficient.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Safe-driving item about encountering a group of schoolchildren — correct behaviour 'ralentir et passer à vitesse réduite' matches source option C. No strong matching existing qid in shortlist; create new localized question.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt and options match q0461 exactly (detain vehicle when license plate not hung). Top candidate identical; correct meaning corresponds to source option A.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source ROW exactly matches q0221 (driver must fasten seatbelt before driving). True => local answer A (Yes).

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Source asks which yields 6 penalty points; candidate matches are inconsistent (different option orders/translations). To avoid mapping errors, create new. Based on source options, illegal occupation of emergency lane (D) is the intended answer.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Item about icy/snow road main impact matches q0168; option D (poor braking and deviation) corresponds to candidate correct answer.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: No clear candidate match for allowance to drive up to one year after license expiry. Source is a false statement (cannot legally drive after expiry). Create new to capture locale-specific rule (answer: No).
